name: Social Advertising
description: Plans and executes paid advertising campaigns across social media platforms including Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X to reach target audiences with relevant messaging.

variables.name: platforms
variables.description: Social platforms to advertise on: Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, etc.

variables.name: campaign_objective
variables.description: Campaign goal: brand awareness, reach, engagement, lead generation, conversions

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Audience targeting parameters: demographics, interests, custom audiences

variables.name: creative_formats
variables.description: Ad formats to use: feed, stories, reels, carousel, lead forms

inputs.name: platforms
inputs.description: Social platforms to advertise on: Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, Pinterest, etc.
